author: OE-GOD
description: ANS weight compression — replaces LZMA with per-layer rANS encoding. Saves 1.6 MB (13.9%) losslessly on int6 quantized weights. Near-optimal: within 11 KB of theoretical entropy minimum.
hardware: Analysis only (Mac M-series). Needs 8xH100 for full training + BPB measurement.
notes: Orthogonal to all architecture/training improvements. Can be stacked on any submission.
